name: Tower Attack War 3D
description: Tower Attack War 3D is a free casual online game for boys played on PuzzleGame. Collect bricks and summon more soldiers to attack enemies' towers. Let's see who can destroy the other side's tower first. Remember to upgrade your soldiers and strengthen their fighting capacity. There is also a multiplayer mode waiting for you to unlock. Mobile, Tablet, and Desktop are playable. Come to play now.
tags: Android, Boy, Brain, Bricks, Fun, Kids, Multiplayer, Online, Puzzle, Stickman, Strategy
